proposals.reason: Backend ValidationError: 'username: Length of qa_e2e_user_dbcf62e6_seed 25 > 20'. The User.username field has max_length=20 (verified in app/models/admin.py line 2). The seed_username uses pattern f'{unique_username}_seed' where unique_username itself is 19 chars (qa_e2e_user_<8hex>), so seed becomes 25 chars. Test must construct seed_username within 20 chars without changing product code.

patch_plan.description: In test_create_user_duplicate_email_shows_error, replace 'seed_username = f"{unique_username}_seed"' (line ~91) with 'seed_username = f"s_{unique_username[2:]}"[:20]' so the seed username remains within the 20-char username limit while still being distinct from unique_username. The 's_' prefix + slice keeps the uniqueness suffix and stays <= 20 chars.
constraints: must keep seed_username distinct from unique_username
must keep email = f'{unique_username}@example.com' (this is what triggers duplicate-email)

verification.expected_effect: test_create_user_duplicate_email_shows_error proceeds past seed creation and asserts the dialog stays visible after dup-email submit

proposals.reason: Both tests use page.get_by_role('button', name='确定') to confirm a Naive UI Popconfirm. In Naive UI zhCN locale (verified at web/node_modules/naive-ui/es/locales/common/zhCN.mjs), Popconfirm.positiveText defaults to '确认', NOT '确定'. The inline NPopconfirm in web/src/views/system/user/index.vue (lines 182, 208) does not pass positiveText, so it falls back to the locale default '确认'. The locator name='确定' therefore times out at 15000ms.

patch_plan.description: In test_delete_user_removes_row (~line 179) and test_reset_password_normal_user (~line 224), replace 'page.get_by_role("button", name="确定").click()' with 'page.get_by_role("button", name="确认").click()'. Both occurrences are Popconfirm confirmations that follow row.get_by_role('button', name='删除' / '重置密码').click(). Do not replace any '确定' that targets a modal save button — modal save uses '保存' per existing selector_overrides_applied.G1.
constraints: scope: only Popconfirm confirmation buttons after delete/reset clicks
must not modify NDataTable header or modal save buttons

verification.expected_effect: Popconfirm '确认' button is found within timeout; delete and reset_password tests proceed to their respective success-toast assertions

not_eligible.reason: Test asserts response.status_code == 401, but FastAPI Header(...) returns 422 when the 'token' header is missing (request validation runs before AuthControl logic). This is a deliberate framework behavior; changing the assertion to 422 would weaken the security spec, and changing the product to return 401 would require modifying app/core/dependency.py AuthControl.is_authed signature. Persisted across iterations 1 and 2.

known_product_issues.title: Backend returns 500 on tortoise.exceptions.ValidationError instead of 422
known_product_issues.evidence: Phase 12 backend log: '2026-06-13 00:26:51 - 127.0.0.1:64943 - POST /api/v1/user/create HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error' with traceback ending in 'tortoise.exceptions.ValidationError: username: Length of qa_e2e_user_dbcf62e6_seed 25 > 20'
known_product_issues.expected_behavior: Returns 422 Unprocessable Entity with field-level error
known_product_issues.actual_behavior: Returns 500 Internal Server Error with stack trace
known_product_issues.scope: Affects all create/update endpoints when input violates DB-level field constraints not caught by Pydantic schema (e.g., max_length for CharField that schema declares only as 'str').
known_product_issues.recommended_next_action: Add tortoise.exceptions.ValidationError handler in app/core/exceptions.py or extend Pydantic schemas with explicit max_length constraints. NOT in scope of this change.
